title: Merge Duplicate Records
overview: An #Action Button is configured to let business users trigger automated deduplication with a single click. The Executable uses the Merge action with Apply Duplicate Matching enabled, applies configurable sorting to identify the principal record, and auto-fills missing fields with values from the merged records.
generalUseCase: Use the Merge action to simplify deduplication with predefined rules—such as applying duplicate matching defined in Salesforce Duplicate Management, automatically selecting the principal record, and filling in missing fields.
